mapper.select: select COUNT(*) as Count, SUM(Amount) as Amount, SUM(ThirdFee) as ThirdFee from withdrawlog where to_days(CreateTime) = to_days(now()) and withdrawlog.AppId = #{appId} and Status = 2

SELECT COUNT(*) as Count, SUM(Amount) as Amount, SUM(ThirdFee) as ThirdFee FROM withdrawlog where DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(CreateDay)
and withdrawlog.AppId = #{appId}
SELECT COUNT(*) as Count, SUM(Amount) as Amount, SUM(ThirdFee) as ThirdFee FROM withdrawlog WHERE TO_DAYS(NOW()) - TO_DAYS(CreateDay) <= 1 and withdrawlog.AppId = #{appId} and Status = 2
